description: Phase B of the 4-phase code-folder README pipeline. Discovery showed actual gaps are smaller than the original plan: 2 fixture folders need new sk-doc READMEs (tests/fixtures/lifecycle, tests/scorer/fixtures), 5 existing READMEs need only a TABLE OF CONTENTS anchor block added (lib/context, lib/scorer/lanes, lib/scorer/lanes/__tests__, scripts/routing-accuracy, stress_test/search-quality). 2 of the originally-listed 9 (lib/skill-graph, stress_test/skill-advisor) already pass sk-doc validate from an earlier upgrade.
